top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran reach peace deal to end the Mideast war, with agreement set to be signed Friday
top_signals.summary: The deal follows weeks of mixed messaging from both Washington and Tehran on the trajectory of the conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
